Plaintiff'S Application Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 340.1 For An Order To Name And Serve Doe Defendant; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Feb-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF JANE ROE'S Application Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 340.1 For An Order To Name And Serve Doe Defendant

Appearance (via ZOOM videoconference):
Andrew Chung, Esq. for plaintiff/moving party;
No other appearance.

The tentative ruling was uncontested, and therefore adopted by the court, as follows:

PLAINTIFF JANE ROE's Application Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 340.1 For An Order To Name And Serve Doe Defendant is

Granted. Moving party to file materials under seal as requested.

Moving party to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported. (302/CK)
